description: De-chunk fix 적용 후 3개 서비스 일괄 테스트. SSE 템플릿 2개 실패, JSON 템플릿 1개 전송 성공(UI timeout).

services.analysis: De-chunk fix did NOT resolve HPACK compression corruption. SSE response headers still corrupt H2 HPACK state. Same error as #405.

result.ui_display: 이런... Duck.ai를 일시적으로 사용할 수 없습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하세요.

services.analysis: 4 retries all failed with ERR_HTTP2_COMPRESSION_ERROR. De-chunk fix had zero effect. Identical to #405 result.

result.ui_display: 抱歉，系统超时，请稍后重试。

services.analysis: JSON template transport works perfectly — 200 OK, h2, no H2 errors, no CORS errors. But frontend shows '系统超时' because it expects SSE streaming, not a single JSON response. Warning text is not displayed to user.

overall_analysis.root_cause_confirmed: NOT chunked encoding. The SSE response Content-Type and headers themselves corrupt H2 HPACK compression state in Etap proxy.
overall_analysis.sse_templates_status: BROKEN — ERR_HTTP2_COMPRESSION_ERROR on all SSE templates (deepseek, duckduckgo)
overall_analysis.json_templates_status: Transport OK but UI shows timeout — frontend expects SSE streaming
overall_analysis.key_finding: Problem is at H2 HPACK header serialization layer, not at body encoding layer. De-chunking the body has no effect because the corruption happens during header compression.
next_steps: 1. Fix H2 HPACK header serialization in Etap proxy for SSE content-type
2. Or: make JSON response mimic SSE streaming format that frontend expects
3. Or: investigate if content-type: text/event-stream triggers different HPACK path

recommendation: SSE injection remains fundamentally broken at H2 transport layer. JSON works for transport but needs frontend-compatible format. Focus on fixing HPACK serialization or finding a content-type that both works with H2 and is accepted by frontends.
